====Pokémon====
This listing is of Saturn's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Saturn
|pkmn=Bronzor
|type1=Steel
|type2=Psychic
|img=Saturn Bronzor.png
|epnum=DP060
|epname=Journey to the Unown!
|vajp=Kiyotaka Furushima
|vaen=Tom Wayland
|desc={{p|Bronzor}} first appeared in ''[[DP060|Journey to the Unown!]]'', where it guided Saturn and his squad through the [[Solaceon Ruins]]. It was also responsible for confusing the {{p|Unown}} living in the ruins which resulted in them all running wild.

In ''[[DP096|Losing Its Lustrous!]]'', Bronzor proved instrumental in Team Galactic's plan to steal the [[Lustrous Orb]] by putting the security teams guarding it to sleep. It was then defeated in battle by {{an|Cynthia}}'s {{TP|Cynthia|Garchomp}}.

Bronzor's known moves are {{m|Flash}}, {{m|Confuse Ray}}, and {{m|Hypnosis}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Saturn
|pkmn=Toxicroak
|main=yes
|type1=Poison
|type2=Fighting
|img=Saturn Toxicroak.png
|epnum=DP069
|epname=Enter Galactic!
|vajp=Shin-ichiro Miki
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|desc={{p|Toxicroak}} first appeared in ''[[DP069|Enter Galactic!]]'', where it helped to steal the [[Veilstone City]] meteorites. During the battle, it developed a fierce rivalry with {{an|Brock}}'s {{TP|Brock|Croagunk}}. It has since become Saturn's main Pokémon.}}

=====Escaped=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Saturn
|pkmn=Heatran
|type1=Fire
|type2=Steel
|img=Saturn Heatran.png
|epnum=JNS01
|epname=The Arceus Chronicles (Part 1)
|vajp=Kenta Miyake
|vaen=Kenta Miyake
|desc={{p|Heatran}} first appeared in ''[[JNS01|The Arceus Chronicles (Part 1)]]'', where Saturn caught it with a [[Dusk Ball]]. He brought it to the [[Team Galactic HQ]], where used it, along with a [[Flame Plate]], to power a device that Team Galactic was using in an effort to bring back [[Cyrus]]. However, in ''[[JNS02|The Arceus Chronicles (Part 2)]]'', the machine overloaded, and Heatran was struck by a burst of flames from it. This triggered its Flash Fire Ability and sent it on a rampage, melting its own Dusk Ball and swallowing the Flame Plate.

Heatran's known moves are {{m|Stone Edge}} and {{m|Magma Storm}}, and its Ability is {{a|Flash Fire}}.}}
